data.title: Big Tobacco Wants Chinese Vapes Banned; Will This Stock Go Up In Smoke?
data.description: Big tobacco's lobbying to impose additional tariffs or ban disposable vaping devices made in China - can hurt this stock.

data.title: Why Are Manpower's Stocks Plunging On Thursday?
data.description: ManpowerGroup (NYSE: MAN) posted weaker Q1 FY25 results, with EPS at $0.44 vs. $0.50 estimate. Revenue fell 7.1% year-over-year but beat forecasts at $4.09 billion.

data.title: What's Keeping Bitcoin Afloat as DXY, US Stocks, and Bonds Sink? A Dive Into The Resilience of BTC
Charles Schwab Q1 Earnings Beat: Boosts Dividend 8%, Adds $138 Billion In Net New Assets & More
data.description: The Charles Schwab Corporation (SCHW) reported record first-quarter revenue of $5.60 billion, beating expectations and seeing a 44% increase in net assets.

data.title: Homebuyers Cautious Due To 'Continued Affordability Constraints And Declining Consumer Confidence:' D.R. Horton Cuts Annual Outlook
data.description: D.R. Horton (NYSE: DHI) reported a 15% drop in sales, missing consensus, with EPS beating expectations. Net sales orders and backlog also fell.
